name: rashomon
description: Evaluate prompts and skills through parallel execution comparison in git worktrees. Prompt optimization with BP-001~008 patterns, skill creation/update with quality grading, and blind A/B evaluation.

interface.shortDescription: Prompt and skill evaluation through parallel comparison.
interface.longDescription: Evaluates prompts and skills through parallel execution in isolated git worktrees. Supports prompt optimization with BP-001~008 patterns, skill creation/update with quality grading, and blind A/B comparison.
defaultPrompt: Compare these two prompts and tell me which performs better.
Evaluate this skill draft against the current version.
Optimize this prompt using rashomon's BP patterns.
